spec.query: SELECT mean("mpg_segment") AS "segment MPG" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("outside_temp") AS "outside temp" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("battery_12v_pct") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tire_psi_fl") AS "Front L" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tire_psi_fr") AS "Front R" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tire_psi_rl") AS "Rear L" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tire_psi_rr") AS "Rear R" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("dtc_count") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("cabin_temp") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tpms_warn") AS "Tire Pressure" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("fuel_low") AS "Low Fuel" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("washer_low") AS "Washer Fluid" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("brake_fluid_warn") AS "Brake Fluid" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("key_batt_warn") AS "Key Fob Batt" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("door_fl_open") AS "Front L" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("door_fr_open") AS "Front R" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("door_rl_open") AS "Rear L" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("door_rr_open") AS "Rear R" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("hood_open") AS "Hood" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("trunk_open") AS "Trunk" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "lat" AS "latitude", "lon" AS "longitude" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("lat") AS "latitude", last("lon") AS "longitude" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("fuel_level_pct") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("heading") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("fuel_range") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("odometer") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("mpg_segment") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("is_locked") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("fuel_level_pct") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT last("fuel_range") AS "fuel" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT spread("odometer") AS "miles" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(0)
SELECT last("hev_battery_soh_pct") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("battery_12v_pct") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT last("next_service_distance") FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("odometer") FROM "kia" WHERE time > now() - 30d

spec.description: Timestamp of the newest point in InfluxDB. If this goes stale (> ~65 min = 2 missed polls), the exporter is down or the Kia refresh token died (re-run --auth).
spec.title: Last Data Received

spec.query: SELECT last("hev_battery_soh_pct") AS "SOH" FROM "kia" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(previous)
